Image slot Country Zambia

Southern Africa

Zambia Travel Guide

Best for travelers who want deeper safari immersion and less processed camp experiences.

General information about Zambia

Zambia is revered for walking safaris, strong wildlife density, and a rugged sense of authenticity on the Zambezi and Luangwa systems.

Getting around

Livingstone and Lusaka are the most practical gateways for Zambezi and Luangwa-based circuits.

Best time to visit

June to October is the classic dry-season safari window, especially for South Luangwa and Lower Zambezi.

Planning notes

Use this country page to compare attractions, understand how to move between them, and decide whether the trip works best as a standalone route or part of a broader regional circuit.

Zambia

South Luangwa National Park

One of Africa’s strongest walking safari landscapes.

Nearby stays

Image slot Stay Mfuwe Lodge

South Luangwa National Park

Mfuwe Lodge

A well-known South Luangwa lodge for game drives and walking safari access near Mfuwe.

★ 4.7 (255) From $580 / night
Safari lodge

Dining

Recommended restaurants near each attraction

Image slot Restaurant Mfuwe Lodge Dining

South Luangwa National Park

Mfuwe Lodge Dining

South Luangwa meals are usually attached to camps and lodges because activities start early and the park is not a casual restaurant destination.

★ 4.5 (133) $$$
Safari lodge dining
